MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHAVEZ, ANGEL R. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO AND HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. PALMORE, ERIC DBA PALMORE APPRAISALS WERLAIN, TOM DBAAMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, ANGEL R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERIPRISE AUTO AND HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. WERLAIN, TOM DBAAMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE $1,240.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,282.00, NO SERVICE AS TO DEFT ERIC PALMORE DBA PALMORE APPRAISALS. AS TO DEFT'S SHAWN CELL & TOM WERLAIN, THE COURT FINDS THAT ACTIONS NOT PROPERLY VENUED IN THIS COUNTY, AND WERE INCORRECTLY NAMED AS DEFENDANTS; THE ACTION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO THESE TWO DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
